TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kalangangayawan, title = kalangangayawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kalangangayawan} }

S.FORM: == satangahan == u zuma a sulit u zuma a kamu u kamu nu hulam: == malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan == u zuma a sur~ɾit u zuma a kamu u kamu nu ħur~ɾam: == mar~ɾar~ɾitin tu iħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan ==
S.FORM: == satangahan == u zuma a sulit u zuma a kamu u kamu nu hulam: == malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan == u zuma a sur~ɾit u zuma a kamu u kamu nu ħur~ɾam: == mar~ɾar~ɾitin tu iħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan ==
